fields.name: Segment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the segment to which the segment criteria is linked.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the segment criteria line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of information that the line shows. There are two options: Action or Filter.

fields.name: Action
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the action that the line shows. There are three options:
Add Contacts

Remove Contacts (Reduce)

Remove Contacts (Refine)

fields.name: Table No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the table that the action is based on.

fields.name: Allow Existing Contacts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have included existing contacts in the segment.

fields.name: Expand Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have expanded contacts when performing the segment action.

fields.name: Allow Company with Persons
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have allowed companies with recorded contact persons when performing the action.

fields.name: Ignore Exclusion
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have included in the segment contacts for which Exclude from Segment was selected on the contact card.

fields.name: Entire Companies
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have included both companies and persons when segmenting.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table on which the segmentation action was based.

fields.name: No. of Filters
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of filters that you have applied when performing the action.
